_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL IMPORT
name: Discord Advanced Moderation Bot
author: you@example.com
description: A production-ready Node.js egg for advanced Discord moderation bots with automod, anti-raid, logging, slash commands, ticketing, and analytics support.
startup: if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ] && [ "${AUTO_PULL}" = "1" ]; then echo "[startup] pulling latest changes"; git pull --rebase || true; fi; if [ ! -d node_modules ] || [ "${FORCE_INSTALL}" = "1" ]; then echo "[startup] installing dependencies"; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --omit=dev; else npm install --omit=dev; fi; fi; if [ "${RUN_MIGRATIONS}" = "1" ] && npm run | grep -q " migrate"; then echo "[startup] running migrations"; npm run migrate || true; fi; echo "[startup] launching bot"; npm run ${BOT_SCRIPT}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Discord Advanced Moderation Bot Egg Installer
set -euo pipefail

cd /mnt/server

echo "[install] node version:"
node -v || true
npm -v || true

if [ -n "${GIT_ADDRESS:-}" ] && [ -n "${GIT_BRANCH:-}" ]; then
  echo "[install] cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (${GIT_BRANCH})"
  if [ -d .git ]; then
    rm -rf .git
  fi
  git init
  git remote add origin "${GIT_ADDRESS}"
  git fetch --depth 1 origin "${GIT_BRANCH}"
  git checkout -b "${GIT_BRANCH}" "origin/${GIT_BRANCH}"
fi

if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
  echo "[install] ERROR: package.json not found. Upload your bot source or set GIT_ADDRESS + GIT_BRANCH."
  exit 10
fi

if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
  echo "[install] npm ci"
  npm ci --omit=dev
else
  echo "[install] npm install"
  npm install --omit=dev
fi

if [ ! -f .env ] && [ -f .env.example ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
  echo "[install] created .env from .env.example"
fi

if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cat > .env <<EOF
DISCORD_TOKEN=${DISCORD_TOKEN:-}
CLIENT_ID=${CLIENT_ID:-}
GUILD_ID=${GUILD_ID:-}
OWNER_IDS=${OWNER_IDS:-}
PREFIX=${PREFIX:-!}
LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}
REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL:-}
DASHBOARD_ENABLED=${DASHBOARD_ENABLED:-0}
DASHBOARD_PORT=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-3000}
EOF
  echo "[install] generated baseline .env"
fi

echo "[install] complete"

variables.name: Startup Script
variables.description: NPM script used to launch the bot process.

variables.name: Primary Guild ID
variables.description: Optional guild id for fast slash-command registration/testing.

variables.name: Owner IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated user IDs with super-admin access to bot controls.

variables.name: Command Prefix
variables.description: Legacy prefix for text commands if your bot supports it.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal

variables.name: Database URL
variables.description: Postgres/MySQL/SQLite connection string depending on your ORM adapter.

variables.name: Redis URL
variables.description: Used for distributed caching, queues, anti-raid burst controls, and cooldowns.

variables.name: Enable Dashboard
variables.description: Set 1 to run an HTTP dashboard in the same process or worker.

variables.name: Dashboard Port
variables.description: Port used by dashboard if enabled.

variables.name: Auto Pull Git
variables.description: Pull latest commit on startup when repository exists.

variables.name: Force Reinstall Dependencies
variables.description: Set 1 to run npm install/ci at every startup.

variables.name: Run Migrations
variables.description: Set 1 to run npm run migrate at startup when script exists.

variables.name: Git Repo URL
variables.description: Optional repository URL to auto-clone during installation.
